title: calophyllum suberosum
intro: Calophyllum suberosum, also known as the "Dragon's Blood Tree", is a plant species that belongs to the family Calophyllaceae. The resin of this plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. It has been used to treat various health issues, including wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems, due to its ability to promote tissue repair, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. The resin can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as tinctures, ointments, and salves, which can be used topically to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
